moments.note: The pond was mostly frozen with heavy ice coverage.

A large amount of ice has melted—around 50%?
Observed sparrows foraging by kicking aside fallen leaves with their feet in areas where the water flow becomes shallow.

The ice seems to have almost completely melted; fish are actively moving.
They appear to prefer BVP. Why might that be? There are fewer people here, and it is farther from the road.
Partway through, a group of white-throated sparrows (WTs) suddenly gathered in large numbers.
A squirrel was observed consuming snow
Many birds around the park overall. I could heard many bird songs.
